MODULE: cosmos.cicd.gitlab_ci
FILE: cosmos/cicd/gitlab_ci.py (639 lines)
CATEGORY: cicd

DESCRIPTION: cosmos GitLab CI Integration

"GitLab? Is that where the gits are kept?"

GitLab CI/CD pipeline management via the GitLab API.

CLASSES:
- GitLabCIManager(CICDProvider): GitLab CI/CD integration.

Features:
- Pipeline management
- Job control
- Varia
  Methods: async def list_pipelines(self, repository: str) -> List[Pipeline]
  Methods: async def get_pipeline(self, pipeline_id: str) -> Optional[Pipeline]
  Methods: async def create_pipeline(self, pipeline: Pipeline) -> bool
  Methods: async def update_pipeline(self, pipeline: Pipeline) -> bool
  Methods: async def delete_pipeline(self, pipeline_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def trigger_pipeline(self, pipeline_id: str, branch: str='main', variables: Dict[str, str]=Non
  Methods: async def create_pipeline_run(self, project: str, ref: str='main', variables: Dict[str, str]=None) -
  Methods: async def get_run(self, run_id: str) -> Optional[PipelineRun]
